hindi: जय महावीर स्वामी जैन। चौबीसवें तीर्थंकर महान॥
english: Victory to Mahavira Swami of Jainism; the great twenty-fourth Tirthankara
roman: Jai Mahavir Swami Jain, Chaubeesven Tirthankar Mahan

hindi: अहिंसा परमो धर्म। महावीर का यही कर्म॥
english: Non-violence is the supreme dharma; this was the work of Mahavira
roman: Ahimsa Paramo Dharm, Mahaveer Ka Yahi Karm

hindi: वर्धमान से महावीर। तप साधना के थे अमीर॥
english: From Vardhamana to Mahavira; rich in the practice of penance
roman: Vardhamaan Se Mahaveer, Tap Sadhana Ke The Ameer

hindi: सत्य अहिंसा अस्तेय चाहिए। ब्रह्मचर्य अपरिग्रह राहिए॥
english: Truth, non-violence, non-stealing are needed; celibacy and non-possessiveness must be followed
roman: Satya Ahimsa Asteya Chahiye, Brahmacharya Aparigraha Rahiye

hindi: पावापुरी में निर्वाण पाया। दीपावली पर ज्ञान ललाया॥
english: He attained liberation in Pawapuri; wisdom blazed on Diwali day
roman: Pawapuri Mein Nirvaan Paya, Deepawali Par Gyan Lalaya

hindi: महावीर चालीसा जो गावे। जैन धर्म का सार वो पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Mahavir Chalisa; attains the essence of Jain dharma
roman: Mahaveer Chalisa Jo Gaave, Jain Dharm Ka Sar Vo Paave

hindi: जय जय महावीर स्वामी। अहिंसा के तुम हो नामी॥
english: Victory to Mahavira Swami; you are renowned for non-violence
roman: Jai Jai Mahaveer Swami, Ahimsa Ke Tum Ho Nami
